summary: Single page wedding villa website for KGF Villa. Features WhatsApp contact link and Google Maps address display. Business details: KGF Villa, +91 73559 36696, Medical Chauraha, inside KP Ground, George Town, Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh 211002.
architectural_notes: Business: KGF Villa | Phone: +91 73559 36696 | Address: Medical Chauraha, inside KP Ground, George Town, Prayagraj, UP 211002
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Elegant wedding venue hero background — wide cinematic shot of a decorated outdoor wedding mandap with warm golden-hour lighting, flower garlands, and fairy lights (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Decorative floral divider ornament in gold on transparent background (floral-divider.dim_800x80.png)
- KGF Villa logo — elegant text-based logo with gold lettering on dark background, floral accent (kgf-villa-logo.dim_400x120.png)

existing_features.title: Create a single-page wedding villa website for KGF Villa with a warm, elegant visual theme (soft ivory, gold accents, serif typography) that conveys luxury and romance. Apply this style consistently across all sections.

Build a Hero section at the top of the page displaying the business name 'KGF Villa' with a full-width background image, a short tagline (e.g., 'Your Dream Wedding Destination'), and a prominent Call-to-Action button that links to WhatsApp.

Add an About / Venue Highlights section describing KGF Villa as a premium wedding venue. Include 3–4 feature cards (e.g., elegant halls, lush gardens, catering, event management) with icons and short descriptions.

Add a Contact section that displays the phone number '+91 73559 36696' and a WhatsApp button. The button must open WhatsApp with a pre-filled greeting message using the URL: https://wa.me/917355936696?text=Hello%2C%20I%27m%20interested%20in%20booking%20KGF%20Villa.

Embed a Google Maps iframe in the Contact section showing the address: 'Medical Chauraha, inside KP Ground, George Town, Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh 211002'. Use a Google Maps embed URL centered on this location. Also display the full address as readable text below the map.
Add a sticky or fixed navigation bar at the top with the logo/name 'KGF Villa' and anchor links to each section (e.g., Home, About, Contact). On mobile, collapse into a hamburger menu.
Add a footer displaying the business name 'KGF Villa', address, phone number, and a WhatsApp contact link. Include a copyright notice.

new_feature_requests.summary: Single page wedding villa website with clean design for KGF Villa
Google Maps embed/link displaying address: Medical Chauraha, inside KP Ground, George Town, Prayagraj, UP 211002
